comparison_surface_note: Compares official Login clientbound login_compression framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Login clientbound login_compression framed dispatch/decode; not compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Login clientbound login_compression packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official compressionThreshold=0 fixture only; it does not prove compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
